Operation 'listdeliveries' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Description explains input requirements clearly but lacks information about what is returned. Added clarification about the return value (list of delivery objects) and the filtering mechanism to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: View a list of deliveries. At least one of cell or customerId must be provided.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of deliveries filtered by cell number or customer ID. At least one of these parameters must be provided. Returns a list of delivery objects containing delivery status and metadata.
data.reasoning: Description explains input requirements clearly but lacks information about what is returned. Added clarification about the return value (list of delivery objects) and the filtering mechanism to improve AI agent understanding of when and how to use this operation.

Description mentions the cost (important operational detail) but lacks clarity on what the operation returns and what 'targeting criteria' means in this context. Added explanation of the return value and clarified that this validates compliance status for each cell number to improve AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Query a list of cell numbers against a campaign's targeting criteria. Costs 0.14 credits per cell queried.
data.description_suggestion: Validate a list of cell numbers against a campaign's targeting and compliance criteria. Costs 0.14 credits per cell queried. Returns compliance status for each queried cell number, indicating whether each number meets the campaign's targeting requirements.
data.reasoning: Description mentions the cost (important operational detail) but lacks clarity on what the operation returns and what 'targeting criteria' means in this context. Added explanation of the return value and clarified that this validates compliance status for each cell number to improve AI agent decision-making.
